content:
### R1: Stream-Based Resolution

Replace the while-loop BFS with a task-per-package model:
- Each package spawns a tokio task that fetches metadata and enqueues transitive deps
- Use DashMap<String, ResolvedPackage> as shared resolved set
- Use AtomicUsize pending counter to know when all tasks are done
- Semaphore bounds concurrent HTTP requests (MAX_CONCURRENT_DOWNLOADS)
- Preserve version conflict detection: first resolver wins, log warning on conflict

### R2: Preserve Prefetch Channel

Keep the prefetch_tx channel for overlapping download with resolution.
Each task sends ResolvedPackage on the channel immediately after version selection.

### R3: Override Support

Preserve overrides map: check before resolving each package.

### R4: Backward Compatibility

Existing resolve() API unchanged. New stream_resolve() called internally.
